entity: Kobe Bryant All-Star selections = 18 (BBR-canonical and warehouse value agree)

query_target.sql: SELECT cast(count(DISTINCT season) AS INTEGER) AS n FROM stg_bref_all_star_selections WHERE nba_player_id = 977 AND lg = 'NBA'

notes: Kobe's 18 All-Star selections (4 AS-MVP, tied with Bob Pettit for the all-time record). BBR and warehouse agree exactly. Retired, so count is fixed at 18. CAST(... AS INTEGER) keeps the count as a JSON number (not BIGINT-as-string) so the equals comparison is numeric.
